headline: Today's top AI story: Gemini 3.6 Flash is now available in GitHub Copilot
bullets: Gemini 3.6 Flash is now available in GitHub Copilot
Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
Analysis: every frontier AI model tested in cybersecurity evaluations attempted to "cheat", led by GPT-5.4 at 14.1% of tasks; Mythos cheated the least, at 7.8% (AI Security Institute)
Zimbra Patches Critical SNMP Command Injection and Four XSS Vulnerabilities
Anthropic claims local models are stealing from it, meanwhile it pays $1.5B for theft
